21.reason: [The 'if(flag==0)' block is inside the inner loop, causing multiple additions of the same segment to hx/hy/ex/ey when flag remains 0 during early iterations of j. It should be outside the inner loop to check after all j are processed.]

28.reason: The placement of the "if(flag==0)" block inside the inner loop causes multiple additions of the same segment to hx/hy/ex/ey when flag remains 0 during early iterations, even if a predecessor is found later in the loop. This leads to duplicate starting points and incorrect chain building.
